topic: mean, median, mode, outliers, and choosing best measure
latex:
You sent the same email to 10 of your friends. The numbers of hours it took them to reply were 1, 1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 4, 5, 5, and 25.

\textbf{a.} Find the mean, median, and mode of the data.

\textbf{b.} Which measure best represents the data? Explain your reasoning.

\textbf{c.} Which data value is an outlier? Explain your answer.

\textbf{d.} Which measure does the outlier affect the most?
